## Reviewer Phase

Author checklist:

- [ ] I ran the relevant checks or explained why they could not run
- [ ] I updated docs/contracts/tests with the code
- [ ] I did not include secrets or real user data
- [ ] I am not self-approving this PR

Reviewer checklist:

- [ ] Separate reviewer approval is required before merge
- [ ] Security/privacy impact was reviewed
- [ ] Tests and contracts match behavior
